raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Assembly Natural Resources Committee passed SB 188, a bill that would prohibit the State Lands Commission from approving any leases authorizing new oil and gas drilling exploration off the California coast.",
    "SB 188 would also prohibit the renewal of leases that would engage in any new exploration or development of oil or gas drilling.",
    "The bill was introduced in response to President Donald Trump’s executive order that would expand offshore drilling.",
    "The bill aims to protect the health of residents living and working near the California coast as well as the marine environment.",
    "The bill is intended to prevent any future oil spills."
  ]
}
```
